title: Implement independently verifiable CI and release evidence
rawUserRequest: 继续实施 2026-07-22 Conditional GO Review Remediation 全部计划，严格按顺序完成当前工单、PR、合并、ai-close-work-item 和后续工单，最终发布新版本。

declaredIntent.summary: 建立不依赖 PR Body 的独立 CI/Release Evidence，绑定 Workflow Run、Head/Merge SHA、Required Jobs、Conclusion、Artifact Digests、SBOM、Provenance 和失败原因。

outOfScope: Complexity repayment and installer decomposition (Work Item 10).
Publishing the final new release; release publication remains the final plan deliverable.
Treating PR description text, agent chat, or self-declared passed claims as evidence.

sources.reason: Approved plan Work Item 9 objective and acceptance.
Repository Work Item and release evidence lifecycle rules.
Closed predecessor Summary and verification evidence.
Current source-bound release workflow and provider evidence boundary.
Current PR and main CI workflow.
Public release artifact and correlation validator.
SBOM, provenance, and release digest producer.

riskAssessment.reason: After the user's explicit confirmation, this Work Item is bounded to fail-closed evidence validation, workflow evidence generation, documentation, and regression tests; it does not publish a release or change the candidate state machine.

executionDecision.reason: The predecessor Work Item is closed and the user authorized serial execution of the complete plan.

preReviewWarnings: User authorization recorded in the Preflight decision evidence: normalize provider payloads to the Contract schema and fail closed on missing identity; allow null artifacts only for failed/non-release evidence; require provider-side merge relation and never treat local fixtures or PR Body claims as release proof.
Reviewers must verify that verified/published states cannot be derived from PR Body claims and that every evidence record binds Run, Head SHA, Required Jobs, Conclusion, and artifact identities.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: CI/Release Evidence has an independently validated schema containing Workflow Run ID, Head SHA, Required Job Names, Conclusion, Artifact Digests, SBOM, Provenance, failure reasons, and PR Head-to-Merge relationship.
A command and workflow path generate/validate structured evidence without reading PR Body text; missing Run/SHA or cross-source identities fail closed.
Canonical release state rejects candidate_verified/release_published claims without bound CI Evidence and regression tests cover valid, missing, failed, stale, and PR-body-only cases.
Documentation explains evidence authority, state transitions, CI/PR relation, and the difference between candidate, verified, and published evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.
Evidence authority must be provider/API-derived and source-bound; PR prose is never authoritative.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Valid provider/API evidence binds Run ID, Head SHA, required jobs, artifact digests, SBOM, and provenance.
Missing Run/SHA, stale Head SHA, failed required job, or missing failure reason fails closed.
Canonical verified/published state cannot be authorized by PR Body-only claims and explains PR Head-to-Merge relation.

intent.problem: The repository has strong release asset checks but no single independently verifiable CI/PR evidence record that explains required jobs, Run/SHA identity, failure causes, and PR Head-to-Merge relation outside PR prose.
constraints: Preserve the existing candidate/published release state machine.
Do not claim provider or published evidence from local or chat-only data.
Do not implement Work Items 10 or 11.
intent.rationale: A strict structured evidence boundary lets reviewers independently verify CI and release claims and prevents canonical state from accepting unsupported PR descriptions.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized serial implementation of the full Conditional GO remediation plan, including CI/release workflow, tests, PR, merge, and closure.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
